title: Retail Trader vs Smart Money: Who Wins?
description: 6 months of losses. Then I changed ONE thing. Stop trading like a retail trader and start reading institutional order flow. Here's the debate that will change how you see the markets forever. #ICTTrading #SmartMoneyConcepts #R2FTrading
script: Retail strategy vs smart money. Which one actually works? Retail traders chase breakouts. Buy highs. Sell lows. Stop hunted every time. Smart money uses order blocks. Fair value gaps. They take YOUR liquidity first. Verdict: Read institutional order flow. Stop being the liquidity. Follow R2F Trading for more tips like this.

Retail Trader vs Smart Money: Who Wins?

6 months of losses. Then I changed ONE thing. Stop trading like a retail trader and start reading institutional order flow. Here's the debate that will change how you see the markets forever. #ICTTrading #SmartMoneyConcepts #R2FTrading
